subject: Alfy Studios LLC

recommendations.title: Consider an S Corp election to reduce self-employment tax
recommendations.why_it_may_apply: Annual profit of $180000 may justify electing S Corp treatment so a portion is taken as distributions rather than wages.
recommendations.estimated_benefit: Potential self-employment tax savings on the distribution portion of profit.
recommendations.next_step: Ask a CPA to model an S Corp election against your current treatment.
questions_for_advisor: What reasonable salary supports an S Corp election for this profit level?
Do the payroll and admin costs outweigh the SE tax savings?

recommendations.title: Maximize tax-advantaged retirement contributions
recommendations.why_it_may_apply: Retirement vehicles allow legal tax deferral and are broadly relevant regardless of structure.
recommendations.estimated_benefit: Tax deferral on contributions up to applicable limits.
recommendations.next_step: Ask your CPA which retirement vehicle and contribution level fits.
questions_for_advisor: Which plan maximizes deferral for my income and entity?

disclaimer: Analysis only — not legal or tax advice. Legal optimization (avoidance, deferral, deduction, structuring, planning) only; never evasion. CPA/attorney review required before any action.
